title: duck mod
description:
a mod that adds a duck to your minecraft world
and you can feed the duck with a new item
body:
this is a mod that adds the duck or chicken to your minecraft world
the duck is a small and short animal that lives in water and in the land in most cases
the duck eats the new item that i called as the bread samething a as the old bread or the new bread
the duck lives in a   
ocean and a warm ocean and deep ocean and lukewar ocean and
        
    
    badlands and savvanna plateau and snowy plains and sunflower plains
